item.title:
How do top reasoning models become overconfident?
MIT found that RL rewards correct answers w/o con...
item.description:
How do top reasoning models become overconfident?
MIT found that RL rewards correct answers w/o considering how sure the model is. By training them to estimate their confidence about each answer, the team boosted uncertainty estimates w/o hurting accuracy: https://t.co/zG3GskBc13
--- @MIT_CSAIL | ❤️ 1 | 🔁 1 | 💬 0 | 👁 655
item.author: @MIT_CSAIL
